title: JBL Boombox 3 WiFi Portable Wireless Speaker - Black

description.main: Let's face it, your phone speaker isn't going to get anyone in the party mood. The JBL Boombox 3 is here to save the day. And now that it's got WiFi, the dancing doesn't have to stop when your phone rings. Relax, leave your notifications on, and just stream music straight from Spotify Connect, Apple AirPlay and more. Blast it loud with 3-way speakers, including a dedicated subwoofer. You'll hear every song loud, clear and with absolutely booming bass. It's dust and waterproof, so that's a yes to music on the beach or in the rain. And it'll even work overtime as a powerbank, so you can charge your phone if you need a taxi home.
goodToKnow: Away from internet? Fear not - you've still got that classic Bluetooth option
If you really appreciate your music and movies, you'll love immersing yourself in 3D Dolby Atmos sound
Whether you're listening in the shower or by the pool, the two self-tuning mics will adapt the sound to your surroundings
It'll keep you company for a full day under the sun because the battery lasts up to 24 hours
There's a sturdy metal handle on the top, so you can easily just grab it and bring it with you when going out
Customise EQs, playlists, and all that jazz using the JBL One app
